case_title: JMT LEASING, INC. DBA THRIFTY CAR RENTAL VS BERDUGO, ELI

docket_entries.description: TERMS OF PAYMENT:$500 TO BE PAID BY MONDAY 11/4/96 BALANCE OF $519.50 TO BE PAID AT THE RATE OF $150 PER MONTH BEGINNING 12/15/96 AND ON THE 15TH DAY
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION OCT-30-1996, CONTINUED BY COURT TO NOV-27-1996 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT C
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,215.38 FILED BY JMT LEASING, INC. DBA THRIFTY CAR RENTAL AS TO DEFENDANT BERDUGO, ELI ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-30-1996 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT C
NO APPEARANCE NEEDED ON 11/27/96 IF DEFT HAS PAID $500.00

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF JMT LEASING, INC. DBA THRIFTY CAR RENTAL RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BERDUGO, ELI $1,019.50 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,019.50, AT THE 10/30/96 HEARING, THE COURT ORDERED JUDGE- MENT IN FAVOR OF PLFT IN THE AMT OF $1019.50 AS STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT AS TO DEFENDANT BERDUGO, ELI
SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT BERDUGO, ELI
OF EACH MONTH THEREAFTER UNTIL PAID IN FULL.IF ANY PAYMENT IS MISSED, THE ENTIRE BALANCE BECOMES DUE IMMEDIATELY
DEFT BERDUGO, ELI TO PAY JUDGMENT OF $1,019.50 PRINCIPAL, $0.00 COST TO PLTF JMT LEASING, INC. DBA THRIFTY CAR RENTAL.
